positive: A stylized, highly contrasting graphic illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) emerging from a full moon halo. The fox is depicted with elegant, flowing lines, dramatic wispy tails, and glowing amber eyes. The background should be a deeply saturated indigo and midnight blue gradient, contrasted sharply by crisp pops of neon gold and electric cyan light that outline the fox and the celestial elements. Composition must be centrally focused and vertical, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Use a clean, vector-art inspired style combined with ethereal, mystical watercolor texture. Strong silhouettes, minimal noise, high readability, perfect symmetry.
negative: lowres, artifacts, grain, blur, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, poor lines, muted colors
